subject: feat(theme): independent per-mode DaisyUI theme selection
body:
Replace paired nord/night theme with independent per-mode selection.
Users pick their light theme and dark theme separately from 16 curated
options (8 light + 8 dark). Mode toggle shows the relevant theme list.

New files:
- src/config/daisyuiThemes.js: Theme catalog with metadata (names,
  descriptions, meta theme-color values for PWA status bar)
- src/components/ThemeSelector.jsx: Dropdown combining mode toggle
  (sun/moon) with theme picker

Changes:
- index.css: Register all 16 themes in @plugin directive
- useDarkMode.js: Per-mode theme state with localStorage persistence,
  cross-tab sync for lightTheme/darkTheme keys
- index.html: Flash-prevention reads per-mode theme from localStorage
- App.jsx, DesktopLayout, MobileLayout, ReaderMode: Thread new theme
  props and replace old toggle button with ThemeSelector

Tags: theme, daisyui, ui, ux
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor

title: independent per-mode DaisyUI theme selection
